summary: End-to-end testing for Rohit Dhongade portfolio (React 19 + FastAPI). Backend: 8/8 pytest cases passed covering /api/, /api/health, and POST/GET /api/contact incl. validation. Frontend: hero, sticky nav (8 links), mobile menu, about, 8 skill tachometers with animated needles, marquee, 2 experience cards, 2 education cards with scores 64.21% & 63.85%, workshop (SAI SERVICE + Professor Chowk + 5 service rows + stats + hero card), 4 hobby cards (Bike, Gaming, Turf, Cricket), contact cards (phone/email/linkedin/location) and form all render correctly. Contact form: empty submit -> 'All fields are required' toast; valid submit -> 'Message received' toast; entry persisted via GET /api/contact.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider migrating to lifespan handlers (non-blocking).
CORS allow_origins is '*' with allow_credentials=True (Starlette will drop credentials silently). If credentials are needed later, tighten origin list.
POST /api/contact returns 200 by default; a 201 Created would be more semantically correct (minor).
seed_data_creation: Two contact-message rows created via API: name='TEST_Rohit_Tester' and name='UI_Tester_Rohit'. Safe to leave or purge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL from /app/frontend/.env (REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL). Skill codes in /app/frontend/src/data/rohit.js are MNT-01, DGN-02, PVM-03, TLS-04, QSC-05, TRW-06, TMC-07, CHN-08 (not sequential MNT-01..CHN-08 as review implied). Contact form testids: contact-form, input-name, input-email, input-message, contact-submit. Sonner toast selector: [data-sonner-toast]. Mobile menu toggle only visible <768px.
rca of the issue: No issues encountered — all flows behave as specified.
